info.title: HIV self-test result ValueSet Schema API
info.description: JSON Schema for HIV self-test result ValueSet ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.

get.summary: JSON Schema definition for the enumeration ValueSet-HIV.B.DE44

ValueSet-HIV.B.DE44.title: HIV self-test result ValueSet Schema
ValueSet-HIV.B.DE44.description: JSON Schema for HIV self-test result ValueSet ValueSet codes. Values are represented as Coding objects with 'system' and 'code' properties.
ValueSet-HIV.B.DE44.narrative: This schema validates Coding-shaped objects for the HIV self-test result ValueSet ValueSet. Each value must be an object with 'system' (CodeSystem URI) and 'code' (fragment after '#') properties. Display values are available at http://smart.who.int/hiv/ValueSet-HIV.B.DE44.displays.json. The canonical IRI for a code can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code. For a complete listing of all ValueSets, see artifacts.html#terminology-value-sets.
